subcodes.first_line: O steadfast leaf! Though the calamity that hath befallen thee is a soul-consuming fire and a heart-piercing arrow, yet the ancient wisdom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ورقه موقنه هر چند مصیبت وارده آتش جانسوز است و تیر جگردوز ولی حکمت قدیمه و
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @forgiveness; a sin-covering eye; patience and forbearance, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
